title: Abbara
overview: Abbara is a action entertainer movie directed by K Ramnarayan. The movie casts Prajwal Devaraj, Rajshri Ponnappa, Nimika Ratnakar and Lekha Chandra are in the lead roles. The Music composed by Ravi Basrur. The film is produced by Basavaraj Manchaiah.
